author: W0Nm
content: Delivered crossbridge-server crate per .design/server.md. 29 tests pass; clippy/fmt clean. All 10 acceptance criteria validated in .kickoff-report.json. Caveats: comment-sync to crosslink hub failed during this session due to a stale agent-key path picked up from another worktree (pre-existing repo state issue); commit landed cleanly.
